episodes.title: Epstein cover-up accusations: Sen. Ron Wyden, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent sound off at hearing
episodes.description:
Sen. Ron Wyden (D-OR) and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent traded accusations regarding alleged attempts to hide information related to Jeffrey Epstein at a Finance Committee hearing Wednesday, June 3.
 
During his opening statement Wyden, the committee's ranking member, said that Bessent has been preventing the release of records showing payments by Epstein's clients.
 
Bessent countered that the Wyden was attempting to divert attention from an alleged "investment meeting" between the senator's son, Adam Wyden, and Epstein.
 
When Finance Committee Chair Mike Crapo (R-ID) said that he would begin questioning, the Treasury secretary broke in to mention that the younger Wyden is an investor in a chain of strip clubs.
 
#Epstein #Wyden #Bessent #Treasury #FinanceCommittee

episodes.title: Todd Blanche: Trump's anti-weaponization fund 'not moving forward', justice for Epstein victims
episodes.description:
Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche got into heated exchanges with several House Democrats while testifying Tuesday. Blanche said the DOJ is officially 'not moving forward' with Trump's anti-weaponization fund. He also addressed Trump's IRS audits, pardons and the Epstein files when grilled by various House members.

#toddblanche #trump #antiweaponizationfund

episodes.title: Keir Starmer faces Epstein fallout as UK releases Mandelson files
episodes.description:
British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has been fighting to stay in power amid falling poll numbers and a growing number of rivals eyeing his job. Now his government has released hundreds of documents tied to the former UK ambassador to Washington, Peter Mandelson, whom Starmer appointed, even with his close ties to Jeffrey Epstein. Could this be more trouble for the prime minister?

Read More: https://thehill.com/

#starmer #ukpolitics #mandelson #epsteinfiles

episodes.title: Rep. Subramanyam: 'I do believe [Epstein] did commit suicide'
episodes.description:
Lawmakers talked to reporters after former prison guard Tova Noel who was on duty when Jeffrey Epstein died in a New York City prison cell testified before the House Oversight Committee.

Tova Noel told federal investigators in 2021 that she believes she was the last person to see the convicted sex offender alive before he killed himself. She has since been fired from her job. 

Democrats have repeated slammed the Trump administration for 'covering up' the Jeffrey Epstein investigation and wanting to put it to an end. 

Former Attorney General Pam Bondi is scheduled to testify before the House Oversight Committee on May 29, 2026, regarding the Justice Department's handling of the Jeffrey Epstein files. 

#Epsteinfiles #DOJ #TovaNoel #House #JeffreyEpstein

episodes.title: An 'egregious cover-up': Dems say Howard Lutnick blatantly lied in his testimony about Epstein ties
episodes.description:
In the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick provides closed-door testimony related to the panel’s Jeffrey Epstein investigation. 

Democrats answered questions after the deposition and were seemingly shocked by Lutnick allegedly lying during his testimony about visiting Epstein after he saw the 'massage tables' on the island. They call for his resignation and say this is all part of a cover-up by the administration. 

Rep. Suhas Subramanyam said 'stay tuned' after a reporter asked if they were going to move towards allowing video into other depositions about Epstein ties in the future.


#epsteinfiles #howardlutnick #deposition

episodes.title: Judge dismisses Trump's Wall Street Journal defamation suit over Epstein story
episodes.description:
A federal judge tossed President Trump’s defamation suit against The Wall Street Journal on Monday over a story it published detailing a letter Trump allegedly sent to disgraced sex offender Jeffrey Epstein for his 50th birthday. 

Trump denies writing the letter and claims it was faked. But U.S. District Judge Darrin Gayles ruled the president failed to allege “actual malice,” the high bar public figures must clear to pursue defamation claims. 

#trump #epsteinfiles #wallstreetjournal #law 

Read more: https://thehill.com/homenews/media/5828714-judge-dismisses-trump-wall-street-journal-lawsuit/

episodes.title: Pam Bondi will no longer testify for House Epstein investigation
episodes.description:
Former Attorney General Pam Bondi will not comply with a subpoena to appear before the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee as part of its investigation into the Epstein files, the panel’s Republican leadership said in a statement.

“The Department of Justice has stated Pam Bondi will not appear on April 14 for a deposition since she is no longer Attorney General and was subpoenaed in her capacity as Attorney General,” a spokesperson for the committee said in a statement.

Read more: https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5821724-pam-bondi-oversight-deposition-epstein-files/

#epsteinfiles #epstein #pambondi #trump #doj

episodes.title: Royal Reckoning: Former Prince Andrew Released as Jeffrey Epstein Probe Reignites | TRENDING
episodes.description:
The fallout from the Jeffrey Epstein scandal takes a dramatic new turn as Prince Andrew is arrested and released under investigation by British authorities.

Police detained the former royal for 11 hours and executed a search warrant at Sandringham as part of an expanding probe into alleged misconduct tied to Andrew’s past relationship with Epstein. Though he has not been charged, officials say the investigation remains ongoing.

episodes.title: Pam Bondi VS. Congress: Epstein Files Fight Turns Heated | REWIND
episodes.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi faced intense questioning on Capitol Hill as lawmakers from both parties pressed her over the handling and redaction of files related to Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Capitol Hill CHAOS: Bondi’s Fiery Clashes, Epstein Files Names Revealed, SAVE Act Passes | TRENDING
episodes.description:
Capitol Hill erupted in chaos during a fiery hearing featuring AG Pam Bondi, explosive exchanges over the Epstein files, and stunning revelations from Rep. Ro Khanna.

Khanna named six redacted individuals tied to the Epstein documents, triggering intense reactions in the room. Meanwhile, Howard Lutnick faced pointed questions about time spent on Epstein Island, and Ghislaine Maxwell pleaded the Fifth when pressed for answers.

All of it unfolded as lawmakers pushed the SAVE Act forward in a dramatic day on Capitol Hill.

episodes.title: Pam Bondi CLASHES With Balint, Jayapal & Crockett; DEFENDS DOJ On Epstein Files Release | TRENDING
episodes.description:
Attorney General Pam Bondi went toe-to-toe with lawmakers in a heated hearing on Wednesday as the country’s top lawyer appeared before the House Judiciary Committee for the first time since taking office.

Bondi fielded questions on issues ranging from pending investigations into adversaries of President Trump to immigration, but the most tense exchanges came amid questions about the Epstein files.

episodes.title: Lawmakers Get UNREDACTED ACCESS To Epstein Files, As Maxwell PLEADS THE FIFTH | TRENDING
episodes.description:
Ghislaine Maxwell, the former girlfriend and close associate of Jeffrey Epstein, refused to answer questions during a deposition with the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee on Monday, asserting her Fifth Amendment right.

Maxwell previously indicated her plans to do so, saying she would testify under oath only if she was given criminal immunity.

Starting Monday, members of Congress may review any of the 3 million documents from the Epstein files unredacted in a reading room at the DOJ. They may take notes but are unable to bring electronic recording devices.

Read More:
https://thehill.com/policy/national-security/5729647-ghislaine-maxwell-fifth-amendment-jeffrey-epstein/
https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5729052-epstein-files-congress-review/

episodes.title: Bill And Hillary Clinton REFUSE To Testify In Epstein Inquiry | TRENDING
episodes.description:
The House Republican leading the congressional investigation into Jeffrey Epstein will launch contempt of Congress proceedings against former President Clinton next week after the 42nd president failed to testify on the case under subpoena Tuesday. 

Rep. James Comer (R-Ky.), the chair of the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee, is also threatening contempt against former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton if she does not appear before the panel Wednesday, as requested.

Read More:
https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5686229-clinton-threatened-contempt-congress/
https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5686540-bill-hillary-clinton-subpoena-fight/

About Rising: 
Rising is a weekday morning show with bipartisan hosts that breaks the mold of morning TV by taking viewers inside the halls of Washington power like never before. The show leans into the day's political cycle with cutting edge analysis from DC insiders who can predict what is going to happen. It also sets the day's political agenda by breaking exclusive news with a team of scoop-driven reporters and demanding answers during interviews with the country's most important political newsmakers.

episodes.title: Charlie Kirk Dead, MTG Resigns, Epstein Files & More: Relive 2025’s BIG Political Moments | TRENDING
episodes.description: Charlie Kirk assassination, the government shutdown, MTG resigning, Iran nuclear strikes, Epstein files released and much more. Here is a look at the top political moments in 2025.

episodes.title: Judge ORDERS Ghislaine Maxwell Files To Be RELEASED — 12:30 Report | TRENDING
episodes.description: A federal judge on Tuesday granted the Department of Justice’s (DOJ) request to publicly release scores of records from a sex-trafficking case against Ghislaine Maxwell, the accomplice of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Andrew STRIPPED Of ‘Prince’ Title After New Epstein REVELATIONS | RISING
episodes.description:
King Charles strips his brother, Andrew  of his titles and orders that he vacate his residence in Windsor amid growing scrutiny over the former prince's relationship with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. #PrinceAndrew #JeffreyEpstein #RoyalFamily
